case_title: CHAPMAN, LINDA I. VS ALTA APARTMENTS INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALTA APARTMENTS INC.
CORRESPONDENCE LETTER RE: INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS FROM SCHERER & KENNY LLP FILED ONLY.
PLFT'S REQUEST FILED. RE: RETENTION OF EXHIBITS FOR ONE YEAR.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CHAPMAN, LINDA I. AS TO DEFENDANT ALTA APARTMENTS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-16-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE, $10.00 FEE PAID.
REQUEST TO PRESERVE EXHIBITS FROM MAY 7, 2007 TO MAY 7, 2008.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAPMAN, LINDA I. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALTA APARTMENTS INC. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR DAMAGES OR PENALTIES FOR FAILURE TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS FOR INSPECTION IS DENIED. ISSUES PERTAINING TO ORDERS TO PERMIT INSPECTION OF DOCUMENT, OTHER MATTERS OF CORPORATE GOVERNANCE ARE NOT WITHIN THE JURISDICTION OF THE SMALL CLAIMS COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
